content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于8月19日 21:30 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月2日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了造物「维度影像·莉莉」数值错误的问题。
● 修复了「邀请活动」中部分账号无法显示「绑定邀请」界面的问题。
● 修复了「通讯器」中凯蒂古拉对话中的一处错别字。
● 修复了「通讯器」中墨菲对话中的一处错别字。
● 修复了「典藏馆-影像」中左右查看时不会去掉红点的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」存在无法消除的红点问题。
● 修复了剧情对话自动播放3行及以上文本时，因为滚动过快，导致无法看清的问题。

**V2.3.1.2 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1755610200:F>. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on <t:1756828799:F>. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Fixed the issue with incorrect values for the Relic "Dimensional Image: Lily".
● Fixed an issue where some accounts could not display the "Bind Invitation" interface in "The Invitation Event".
● Fixed a typo in Kathigu-Ra's dialogue in the "Communicator".
● Fixed a typo in Murphy's dialogue in the "Communicator".
● Fixed the issue where the red dot would not disappear when viewing left and right in "Premium Gallery - Images".
● Fixed the issue where the red dot in "Premium Gallery" could not be removed.
● Fixed an issue where the story dialogue auto-played 3 or more lines of text, causing it to scroll too fast to be readable.
